race.comment: SHOULDER PATCH (1) led last start and missed by 0.2L when caught late in the race second-up. Fitter again now and going back in distance shouldn't be an issue. Can go one better this time around in what looks a suitable race on paper. SEMPRE (5) scored two runs back then was well in commission last time but could only manage to finish fifth over 1435m at this track. Looks well placed so expect a big run this time. RULESQUE (3) went forward from the low draw last start and sat on the pace before sticking on well to finish second over 1435m at this track. Nicely placed to take this out. OCEAN OUTLAW (2) can improve third-up and getting out to this trip for the first time. SCHUHBECK (12) is better than he showed last time out and his form prior stacks up in this field. Can put his best foot forward this time.
